question: Modify the `Book` class (from Q1) to include a default constructor (initializes with empty strings), a parameterized constructor, and a copy constructor. Demonstrate creating objects using all three types of constructors.

test_cases.expected:
Book 1 (Default): Title: , Author: 
Book 2 (Parameterized): Title: To Kill a Mockingbird, Author: Harper Lee
Book 3 (Copy of Book 2): Title: To Kill a Mockingbird, Author: Harper Lee
Book 4 (Copy of Book 1): Title: , Author:
